UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2002, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD218 ON OCT.29,2002 AT 9:00 AM GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PRESENT:COMMISSIONER:LORETTA M. NORRIS, CLERK:JOHN STOKES, REPORTER:VALERIE PAPALE.

Default Prove-Up In Scd218 On Oct.29,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regular calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. Douglas Alan Holloway representing plaintiff.The Court finds there is a default against Domingo Hernandez and Prestige Touch and Body Shop, Inc. Judgment filed in the amount of $45,047.00 Principal, $3,500.00 Atty Fees, $2,603.74 Interest, and $276.00 Costs for a total judgment of $51,426.74 and possession of equipment.
